message:
feat(completion): add operational telemetry counters to CompletionTracker [ft-3kxe.21]

Wire 9 counters (tokens_requested/created/rejected, advances,
completions, failures, timeouts, partial_failures, evictions) into
CompletionTracker methods. Add 13 unit tests and 5 property tests
validating counter accuracy, monotonicity, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
